---
title: "Robust and equity-constrained location-allocation of anti-HER2 treatment services in Aotearoa New Zealand"
format:
  html: default
  docx: default
---

# Abstract

Placeholder pending model and data freeze.

# Introduction

# Methods

## Public-data service network and aggregate demand

## Multimodal generalised burden

## Robust and multiobjective location-allocation

## Implied capacity

## Stochastic multicriteria acceptability

## Deterministic, probabilistic, structural, and spatial uncertainty

## Value of information and research design

## Verification, calibration, and claim boundaries

# Results

> Publication gate: synthetic demonstration results are not scientific findings.

# Discussion

# Reproducibility and software availability
